name: Light & Fluffy Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, cinnamon, and cornmeal.
2. Add the apple butter, cornstarch, baking powder, and apple cider vinegar to the dry mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined. The batter should be spongy but not runny or thick.
4. Preheat a frying pan over medium heat.
5. Pour a ladle full of batter into the pan, cooking on both sides until golden brown.
6. Makes 6 large pancakes. These are very filling!
